title: Assault droid (disambiguation)
content:
There were at least three types of '''assault droids''' during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]:

*'''[[Mark I assault droid]]''', whose structure was slightly humanoid.
*'''[[Mark II assault droid]]''', quadrupedal and armed for melee combat.
*'''[[Mark IV assault droid]]''', quadrupedal and armed with dual blasters.

These should not be confused for the [[Assault battle droid]] manufactured by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] for destroying vehicles and turrets on the battlefield.

{{Disambig}}
